mapper.sql: id, user_id, warn_type, proc_inst_id, proc_name, task_name, team_name, node_key, node_name, end_date, is_read, resolved, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_warning (user_id, warn_type, proc_inst_id, proc_name, task_name, team_name, node_key, node_name, end_date, is_read, resolved, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{warnType}, #{procInstId}, #{procName}, #{taskName}, #{teamName}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeName}, #{endDate}, #{isRead}, #{resolved}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE task_warning SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT t1.* FROM task_warning t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(id) AS min_id FROM task_warning GROUP BY proc_inst_id, node_key, warn_type ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.min_id ORDER BY t1.resolved ASC, t1.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(proc_inst_id, ':', node_key, ':', warn_type)) FROM task_warning WHERE resolved = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT MIN(id) AS min_id FROM task_warning GROUP BY proc_inst_id, node_key, warn_type ) t INNER JOIN task_warning w ON w.id = t.min_id WHERE w.is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE task_warning SET is_read = 1 WHERE is_read = 0
